project.name: OpenBookCase
project.description: Crowdsourced web map for finding public bookcases and give-boxes worldwide, partly seeded from OpenStreetMap.

tags.description: Imported as a bookcase entry — the core feature OpenBookCase maps.
Imported as a give-box entry, shown with the give-box map symbol.
Used as the entry's title when present (a URL-bearing name is rejected as spam and a title is generated instead).
Stored as part of the entry's address, and used to build a fallback title when no name is tagged.
Stored as part of the entry's address.
Stored as the entry's opening time; a value of 24/7 is auto-detected and flagged as always open.
Mapped to the entry's accessibility level: no = none, limited = partial, yes/designated = full.
Used as the name of the entry's caretaker.
Used as the caretaker's contact detail (preferred over the plain phone tag).
Used as the caretaker's contact detail when contact:phone is absent.
Used as the caretaker's contact detail when no phone is tagged.
Used as the caretaker's contact detail when contact:email is absent.
Used as the entry's web page, and as a caretaker contact fallback.
Used as the entry's web page when website is absent, and as a caretaker contact fallback.
Used as the entry's web page when neither website nor contact:website is tagged.
Stored as the entry's free-text comment shown to users.
Stored as the entry's free-text comment when no description is tagged.
